MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. The case was transferred to R00m 620 to be heard by Pro Tem Commissioner: Maria S. Spustek. Clerk;John Stokes.Reporter:Patrick Heard.David Mendez representing plaintiff. Co defendants Le Ross Curry and Shavell M. Wade in pro per. Restitution of property located at 20- 6th St., S.F. Writ may issue immediately but eviction stayed to 12/03/02 at 9:00 am. $1,066.00 back rent due. Rents waived if vacated in time.. Plaintiff not opposed to ex parte application to set aside and dismiss judgment with predjudice.
